scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "pnpm run dev:web" "pnpm run dev:api"
scripts.ios:clean: pnpm run xcode:clean && pnpm run build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:dev: pnpm run xcode:clean && pnpm run build && npx cap sync ios && pnpm run ios:open
scripts.ios:stage: pnpm run xcode:clean && pnpm run build:stage && npx cap sync ios && pnpm run ios:open
scripts.ios:prod: pnpm run xcode:clean && pnpm run build:prod && npx cap sync ios && pnpm run ios:open
scripts.android:dev: pnpm run build && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.android:stage: pnpm run build:stage && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.android:prod: pnpm run build:prod && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
